title: Axe Warning !
description:
вљ пёЏ Alerts the player if an enemy is holding an axe in their hand.
рџ”ґ If the enemy is within less than 5 blocks, you will receive both a visual and sound warning.
рџџЎ If the enemy is more than 5 blocks away, you will only see a visual warning on your screen.
body:
# вљ”пёЏ __**Axe Alert Mod**__

рџЄ“ Have you ever been caught off guard in PvP or survival by an enemy sneaking up on you with a devastating axe strike? This mod is specifically designed to give you the **ultimate tactical advantage** вЂ” never be surprised by an axe-wielding opponent again!

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

рџљЁ __**Alert System**__

рџ”ґ **High Danger Zone (Under 5 Blocks):**
If an enemy holding an axe enters a radius of fewer than **5 blocks**, the mod will immediately trigger both an **audio and visual warning** вЂ” ensuring you can react instantly against imminent close-quarters threats!

рџџЎ **Monitoring Zone (5+ Blocks):**
If the axe-wielding enemy is further than **5 blocks** away, you'll receive a **visual warning only** вЂ” so you can track approaching threats strategically without your audio being overwhelmed.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

рџЋЁ __**Complete GUI Customization**__

Press **Right Shift** to open the built-in configuration GUI! From there you can:
вњ… Change the on-screen position of the visual alert
вњ… Customize its color and size
вњ… Pick different warning sounds
вњ… Fine-tune the audio volume

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

вљ™пёЏ __**Technical Requirements**__

рџ§© **Modloader:** Fabric only
рџЋ® **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.11
рџ”¬ **Status:** Beta вЂ” fully functional but minor bugs may occur

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

вљ пёЏ __**Competitive Warning**__

This mod is currently **strictly banned from Tierlists** due to its significant situational awareness advantage. Please disable it before participating in any ranked or official Tierlist fights!

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
